dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION • The recommended starting dosage of mercaptopurine oral suspension is 1.5 mg/kg to 2.5 mg/kg (50 mg/m 2 to 75 mg/m 2 ) orally once daily as part of a combination chemotherapy maintenance regimen. Adjust dose to maintain desirable absolute neutrophil count and for excessive myelosuppression. ( 2.1 ) • Renal Impairment : Use the lowest recommended starting dose or increase the dosing interval.
